title: Herbal Diffuser Pen with Milk Thistle & Dandelion Extracts - Mint Infused Aromatherapy for Wellness, 600 Uses, Portable Essential Oil Device
features: 【Plant-Based Aromatherapy Pen】This portable diffuser contains milk thistle, dandelion, chrysanthemum and mint extracts for aromatic use
【Traditional Herbal Inspiration】Formulated with plants historically used in European wellness practices (not for medical purposes)
【Long-Lasting & Convenient】Provides approximately 600 uses in a compact, travel-friendly design
【Clean & Natural Formula】Free from artificial additives or harsh chemicals, suitable for aromatherapy enthusiasts

【Thoughtful Wellness Gift 】The filters contain 100% organic essential oils (lavender, chamomile). The natural aroma, paired with your breathing rhythm, helps cultivate healthy relaxation habits. Whether gifting loved ones or treating yourself, this breathing stick is an ideal choice to promote mindful living and ease daily stress
description: Product description Upgraded Herbal Diffuser Pen Bundles Directions 1. Ensure the device is in a well-ventilated area. 2. Fill the device with water. 3. Insert the essential oil capsule. 4. Turn on the device to disperse the essential oils. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Keep out of reach of children and pets. See more
